# general

## Overview

This folder contains small general-purpose helper scripts that are not specific to QMD, VASP, DeePMD, LAMMPS, or system setup.

## Scripts

### `mc_error.py`

Monte Carlo style error-estimation helper. Use this for quick uncertainty or sampling-error calculations when the workflow does not belong in a more specific domain folder.

## Generated Files

`__pycache__/` is generated by Python and can be ignored.
